title: lepidophorum repandum
side_effects: Lepidophorum repandum can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Overconsumption of the plant has been linked to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of Lepidophorum repandum can also cause respiratory problems, including difficulty breathing and asthma-like symptoms. It's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid potential side effects.
